data.body: ee0b VALIDATED: independent held-out integrity+no-push oracle (test_opcert_service_integrity_heldout.py) GREEN — signed cert binds server-fetched review-remote main HEAD (from signed envelope payload), and authoritative source's tickets branch byte-identical after PASS (server never pushes). Assertion non-tautological (independent derivation of main_head vs decoded envelope). Implementer's 24 ee0b tests also green. ee0b to be committed+rebased onto #685 PS3 after 8d8e degrade test lands.
